nodes.name: Watch Gmail Inbox
nodes.notes: Production trigger — polls every minute for unread emails. Each poll can return multiple emails.

nodes.name: Is Invoice Email?
nodes.notes: Routes invoices (YES) to the processing branch. Non-invoices stop here.

nodes.name: Extract PDF Text
nodes.notes: Extracts text from PDF attachment. continueRegularOutput means workflow continues even if no PDF is attached.

nodes.name: Label as Expenses
nodes.notes: Adds the Expenses label to the email in Gmail.

nodes.name: Mark as Read
nodes.notes: Marks the processed email as read to prevent re-processing by the Gmail trigger.

nodes.name: Prepare AI Input
nodes.notes: Builds structured text input combining PDF content (or email body fallback) with email metadata. Runs once per item.

attributes.name: vendor_name
attributes.description: The name of the company or person that issued the invoice or receipt

attributes.name: invoice_date
attributes.description: The invoice or purchase date, in YYYY-MM-DD format if possible

attributes.name: total_amount
attributes.description: The total amount charged or paid as a number without currency symbol

attributes.name: currency
attributes.description: The 3-letter currency code such as GBP, USD, EUR

attributes.name: invoice_number
attributes.description: The invoice number, order number, or reference number if present

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: A brief one-line description of what was purchased or the service provided

nodes.name: AI: Extract Invoice Data
nodes.notes: Claude extracts structured data: vendor, date, amount, currency, invoice number, description. Output is in $json.output.

nodes.name: Format Invoice Row
nodes.notes: Maps AI extraction output ($json.output.*) to Google Sheet column names. Adds metadata from Prepare AI Input.

options.systemMessage: You are an email classifier. Your ONLY job is to determine if an email is an invoice, receipt, bill, order confirmation, or purchase confirmation. Reply with exactly 'YES' if it is any of those. Reply with exactly 'NO' if it is not. Do not explain. Do not add any other text. Just YES or NO.

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.notes: Classifies email as invoice/receipt/bill (YES/NO) using Claude Sonnet. Outputs {output: 'YES'} or {output: 'NO'}.

nodes.name: Remove from Inbox
nodes.notes: Removes INBOX label — effectively moves the email from inbox to the Expenses folder.

parameters.messageId: ={{ $('Watch Gmail Inbox').isExecuted ? $('Watch Gmail Inbox').item.json.id : $('Get many messages').item.json.id }}

nodes.name: Get Email with Attachment
nodes.notes: Re-fetches the full email with PDF attachment binary. Simplify must be OFF for attachments to download.

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet
nodes.notes: Writes row to Google Sheet. Deduplicates by Gmail Message ID — same email processed twice updates the existing row.

nodes.name: Get many messages
nodes.notes: First-run bulk scan — fetches up to 100 unread emails for initial client onboarding. Used with manual trigger.

nodes.name: Daily Summary Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires daily at 9 AM to generate the morning invoice summary via Telegram.

nodes.name: Read Expense Tracker
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from the Invoice Processor Google Sheet for summary aggregation.

nodes.name: Build Daily Summary
nodes.notes: Filters to yesterday's + today's invoices, calculates totals by currency, builds Telegram message with HTML formatting.

nodes.name: Send Daily Summary
nodes.notes: Sends the daily invoice summary to Telegram. Uses HTML parse mode for formatting.

parameters.content:
## Daily Summary Branch

**Trigger:** Schedule Trigger fires at 9 AM daily.

**Flow:**
1. Read all rows from the Invoice Processor Google Sheet
2. Filter to yesterday's + today's processed invoices
3. Build summary: count, totals by currency, vendor list
4. Send via Telegram

**Independent branch** — does not connect to the invoice processing pipeline above.

### Step 1: Email Input
Two entry points feed unread emails into the pipeline:

**Production:** Watch Gmail Inbox polls every minute for new unread emails

**First Run:** Manual trigger → Get Many fetches up to 100 unread emails for initial bulk processing (ideal for client onboarding)

### Step 2: AI Classification
Claude Sonnet classifies each email — invoice, receipt, bill, or order confirmation?

**YES** → continues to invoice processing
**NO** → stops here (no further action)

No regex — pure AI classification handles edge cases like HTML receipts, foreign language invoices, and unusual formats

### Step 3: Fetch Attachment & Organise
Re-fetches the full email with PDF binary (Simplify OFF required for attachments to download).

Extracts PDF text if available — continues gracefully if no PDF is attached.

Then organises the email: labels as Expenses, removes from Inbox, marks as read.

### Step 4: Extract Invoice Data
Prepares structured input from the PDF text (or email body fallback) combined with email metadata.

Claude extracts structured fields:
Vendor, Invoice Date, Total Amount, Currency, Invoice Number, Description

### Step 5: Log to Google Sheets
Maps extracted invoice data to spreadsheet columns and appends a row.

Deduplicates by Gmail Message ID — reprocessing the same email updates the existing row instead of creating a duplicate.

main.node: Append or update row in sheet
